overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic luxury bathroom interior from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves slowly from a vanity area with illuminated mirrors toward a steam shower, featuring warm golden accent lighting against dark metallic surfaces and marble flooring.

agents.ego_description: slowly walking away from the vanity mirror toward the center of the bathroom, observing the reflective surfaces and accent lighting

entered.detail: large rectangular mirror with warm golden LED framing and digital display reflection
dark stone countertop with metallic trim beneath the mirror
vertical warm LED strip running along the left wall corner
vertical warm LED strip on the back wall near the shower controls
tall vertical panel with multiple buttons and indicators on the back wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a high-end futuristic bathroom, positioned near a vanity with a large illuminated mirror framed by warm golden lights. The camera moves slowly forward along dark marble flooring, revealing vertical accent lighting strips that cast a luxurious glow against the metallic walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: bathroom transition area with hanging robes

events.description: steam and mist effects become more prominent in the shower area ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past white robes hanging on the right wall, approaching the shower area with visible steam

entered.detail: two white bathrobes hanging on hooks attached to the right wall
vertical warm LED strip running along the right wall corner

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the bathroom, white robes become visible hanging on the right wall as the vanity area recedes behind. Steam begins to fill the air near the shower area ahead, and the warm accent lighting continues to illuminate the dark metallic surfaces from both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: steam shower area with floor drain

events.description: camera tilts downward to focus on the shower floor drain and steam effects

agents.ego_description: looking down at the shower floor drain while standing in the steamy shower area

entered.detail: long rectangular grated drain set into the marble shower floor with geometric pattern

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts downward to focus on the shower floor, revealing a geometric grated drain set into dark marble tiles. Steam rises around the floor area as the hanging robes and wall lighting move out of the primary field of view, emphasizing the wet surface and drainage system.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic luxury bathroom that transitions from a brightly lit vanity area into a steamy shower enclosure. It begins near a large illuminated mirror framed by warm golden lights, gliding forward across dark marble flooring as vertical accent strips cast a glow against metallic walls. As the vanity recedes, the camera passes white robes hanging on the right wall while steam begins to thicken in the air ahead. The scene then shifts focus as the camera tilts downward, moving away from the wall lighting to reveal a geometric grated drain set into the wet marble tiles. Finally, the view settles on the rising steam swirling around the drainage system on the dark floor.
